presets.description: Tint the sprite with a color and intensity for day/night cycles.
Swap 4 source colors to 4 target colors.
Dissolve from bottom up with noise.
Sine wave alpha for ghost effects.
Snap to a pixel grid for retro look.
Full CRT monitor effect with scanlines and curvature.
Red vignette from damage at edges.
Round corners of a UI element.
Color dodge blend with a color.
Add a drop shadow to sprite.
Simple lens flare from a light source.
Bayer dither pattern for retro look.
4-mode transition shader: Basic wipe, Mask reveal, Polygon shape, Clock radial.
Dissolve sprite with burning edge glow. Progress uniform controls visibility.
Add colored outline around sprite edges using neighboring pixel sampling.
RGB channel separation at screen edges for lens distortion effect.
Darken screen edges for cinematic look.
Random block displacement and RGB split for glitch aesthetic.
Gentle horizontal sway for grass, trees, foliage.
Retro pixelation effect with configurable pixel size.
Bright areas bloom and glow. Screen-space post-process for ColorRect.
Blue tint with crystalline overlay for freeze/ice status.
Green desaturation and pulse for poison status.
